def positive_file_path_from_user_input_without_normalization_or_anchor_check():
    rule_id = "file_path_from_user_input_without_normalization_or_anchor_check"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "File path derived from user input without Path.resolve() or anchor containment check."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
